tagline: Turn scattered time into useful momentum.

designSystem.style: Vibrant violet-purple accent with warm amber secondary. Clean card-based layout with gradient hero sections, soft purple tints on surfaces, energy-aware color indicators (green/amber/red), and a seamless light/dark theme system built around deep indigo-black dark surfaces.

screens: Home — greeting hero with energy selector, next gap detector card, recommended task with micro-step preview, and today's gap map timeline
Tasks — filterable task shard library with time window chips (2/5/10/15 min), energy level badges, context tags, step breakdowns, and quick start/complete actions
Focus — active session view with live elapsed timer, progress bar, sequential micro-step checklist with visual state indicators, next/back step controls, and pause/resume timer
Insights — weekly momentum dashboard with per-day bar chart, stat cards (time recovered, shards completed, avg size, streak), category breakdown with progress bars, and 7-day streak celebration card

Settings — theme toggle with animated pill switch, default energy level selector, context preference toggles (calendar detection, energy matching, rhythm learning), gap alert notifications, and app info panel
